content.speakerText: You're always so calm under pressure—I admire that.
content.speakerTextCn: 你总能在压力下保持冷静，我很佩服。
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I just try to breathe and focus.
That's so kind of you to say—I'm still learning!
Oh, stop it—you're making me blush!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚接受赞美，而非否定或回避
语言准确性：语法正确，用词自然，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气轻松，符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thanks', 'still learning', 'make me blush' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I mean it—you handled that client like a pro.
content.speakerTextCn: 我是认真的，你处理客户像专业人士。
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I learned a lot from watching you, actually.
Aww, you're making me blush! I really appreciate that.
Yeah, it worked out—thanks for noticing!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否接受赞美并适当回赞或表达感谢
语言准确性：正确使用 'learned from you', 'making me blush' 等表达
表达自然度：语气真诚、不夸张，符合英语母语者回应习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'thanks', 'learned from you', 'making me blush' 等核心短语
